No. Name of Coal Mine/ Block Name of Prior Allottee State where Coal Mine/ Block Located “69 Suliyari Andhra Pradesh Mineral Development Corporation Madhya Pradesh 70 Brahampuri Pushp Steel and Mining Ltd. Madhya Pradesh 71 Bundu Rungta Mines Limited Jharkhand 72 Gondkhari Maharashtra Seamless Limited, Dhariwal Infrastructure (P) Ltd., Kesoram Industries Ltd. Maharashtra 73 Gondulpara Tenughat Vidyut Nigam Limited, Damodar Valley Corporation Jharkhand 74 Jaganathpur A West Bengal Mineral Dev. & Trading Corp. Ltd. West Bengal 75 Jaganathpur B West Bengal Mineral Development & Trading Corp. West Bengal 76 Khappa & Extn. Sunflag Iron & Steel Ltd., Dalmia Cement (Bharat) Ltd. Maharashtra” [F. No. 13016/9/2014-CA-III (Vol. II)] VIVEK BHARADWAJ, Jt. Secy.
